attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.PROJECT_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.PROJECT_STATUS_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.PROJECT_SYSTEM_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.DESCRIPTION, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.PREDEFINED_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.STARTING_STATUS_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ENABLE_WF_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.WORKFLOW_ITEM_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.WORKFLOW_PROCESS, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.WF_SUCCESS_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.WF_FAILURE_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.STATUS_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.NEXT_ALLOWABLE_STATUS_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.STATUS_ICON_IND, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.STATUS_ICON_ACTIVE_IND, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.PROJECT_STATUS_WEIGHT, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES,
(
select PROJECT_STATUS_CODE,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES
minus
select PROJECT_STATUS_CODE,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES
) ACM
where 
 ACM.PROJECT_STATUS_CODE = STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.PROJECT_STATUS_CODE and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_PROJECT_STATUSES)
